summary: Issue #429 P2-B1 ext (Ads KPI workflow rankings): intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. No-op lock-in — existing run_action_card_refresh → persist_scoring_result already surfaces CTR-ranked mid/large Ads workflows; three contract tests prove persistence, GET list integration, and idempotent re-refresh; MODULE.md documents freshness via metadata.computed_at/updated_at. 10/10 contract tests pass. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps in test-only + documentation slice. Non-blocking intent-review smells (duplicated fixture, skip_poll middle man, GET auth duplication) acknowledged ship-as-is.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): mid_large_shop_with_analytics_ctr fixture mirrors mid/large commerce seed elsewhere.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Extract shared mid/large+analytics factory to conftest on next action_cards test touch.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Local fixture keeps #429 contract tests self-contained; duplication is test-only and does not affect refresh/persist production paths.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): skip_poll fixture plus poll=False on run_action_card_refresh is redundant middle-man wiring.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Pick one poll bypass (fixture monkeypatch or poll=False kwarg) on follow-up.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Redundant but harmless test setup; both paths disable TikTok poll for deterministic analytics CTR fixtures.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): GET integration test reimplements auth overrides; workflow_keys assertions repeated across three #429 tests.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Reuse auth_client fixture and shared workflow_keys assertion helper when consolidating #429 tests.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Explicit dependency overrides document GET path integration; repetition is test-only and does not affect API auth behavior.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: Prefer shared mid/large+analytics factory and auth_client reuse on follow-up.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Consolidate analytics CTR seed builders when either action_cards or scoring contract module is next edited.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: Unused HealthDataSource / ShopLifecycleContext imports.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Remove dead imports on next test file edit.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: CTR ranking + freshness notes match module style.
criticalFindings.suggestion: No action required — documentation placement matches module authority pattern.

criticalFindings.description: Executor note: Stale active cards may linger if a workflow drops out of rankings until explicit status lifecycle is added (upsert-only model per ADR-021).
criticalFindings.suggestion: Track tombstone/inactive lifecycle in a follow-up if card drift becomes user-visible.

criticalFindings.description: Executor note: Mid/large profile gating requires shop age ≥90d or graduation signals — new shops never see Ads workflow cards even with CTR data.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Document gating in product copy if merchants expect Ads cards immediately after analytics sync.

mappings.criterion: post refresh returns enqueues without inline run
analytics refresh persists ads workflow keys
analytics refresh then get lists persisted cards
action cards MODULE freshness computed_at metadata

recommendations: Extract shared mid/large+analytics CTR fixture to conftest when consolidating action_cards contract tests.
Remove skip_poll vs poll=False redundancy and dead imports on next test touch.
Reuse auth_client fixture for GET integration path when refactoring #429 tests.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; all 4 ACs mapped; 10/10 contract tests pass. Accepted ship-as-is for duplicated fixture, skip_poll middle man, and GET auth duplication (test-only slice).

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged WARNING findings; CTR-ranked Ads workflow persistence verified by contract tests; freshness documented in action_cards MODULE.md.
